title: boswellia globosa
intro: Boswellia globosa, also known as the papyriferum tree, is a species of tree native to the island of Socotra, off the coast of Yemen. This tree is a type of frankincense tree and is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and anti-arthritic compounds. The health benefits of Boswellia globosa include reduced pain and inflammation, improved digestion, and improved immune function. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as essential oils, capsules, and teas, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
